title: The Absent Minded Kaji
wikitext:
[]: The Absent-Minded Kaji             Quote Post by Tsukasa » Wed Jan 12, 2005 1:34 pm I am not certain if this has been observed before but listen to this: Remember when Kaji brought Gendo the Adam embryo? Kaji right then knew what Adam was and what Adam looked like. He literally saw Adam in a embryotic form. A few episodes later , Kaji opened Terminal Dogma and showed Misato Lilith, which Kaji said was Adam. So, keeping in mind that Kaji already knew what Adam looked like, how could Kaji mistake Lilith for Adam so easily? P.S. If you look on the NGE: D & R DVD cover, Rei's left hand only has 3 fingers! Silly Sadamoto....

[]: Re: The Absent-Minded Kaji             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Wed Jan 12, 2005 2:05 pm Tsukasa wrote: So, keeping in mind that Kaji already knew what Adam looked like, how could Kaji mistake Lilith for Adam so easily?

[]:             Quote Post by Hexon.Arq » Wed Jan 12, 2005 5:39 pm BTW, I'm sorry I don't have a screenshot, but does anyone happen to know what is written on ADAM's bakelite casing beneath her name? It looks like "Where is your.... " and then just a mess.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed Jan 12, 2005 9:39 pm Hexon.Arq wrote: BTW, I'm sorry I don't have a screenshot, but does anyone happen to know what is written on ADAM's bakelite casing beneath her name?

[]:             Quote Post by aranami » Wed Jan 12, 2005 11:48 pm I agree it looks german. Plus it was comming from Germany with Unit-02.

[]:             Quote Post by Dave » Thu Jan 13, 2005 12:44 am To me it reads as: "Whoisman; heiscrying; why?"

[]:             Quote Post by Hexon.Arq » Thu Jan 13, 2005 4:05 pm I thought that concept was too fattening for your tastes?
